# alg

**Type**

An algorithm you use to sign a JSON Web Signature (JWS).

## Declaration

```swift
string alg
```

## Real-time request header

- **JWSDecodedHeader**: A decoded JSON Web Signature (JWS) header.
- **x5c**: A JSON Web Signature (JWS) header parameter that contains the certificate chain that corresponds to the key you use to digitally sign the JWS.
